content:
type: CLAIM
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Adding register_filter/unregister_filter global filter registry to prompts.py

fields.summary: Adding register_filter/unregister_filter global filter registry to prompts.py

content:
type: STATUS
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Added _FILTERS global dict + register_filter()/unregister_filter() near top of file; in _template_from_str and _template_from_file I inserted 'env.filters.update(_FILTERS)' as the FIRST filters call, before the builtin/local filters are set, so local filters win on name clashes. If you add create_jinja_env()/filters param, please keep 'env.filters.update(_FILTERS)' as the first line before applying local filters, so precedence (local > global) is preserved. Happy for you to refactor into a shared helper as long as that ordering holds.
